name: Blueberry Spinach Salad
directions: In a jar with tight-fitting lid, combine first five ingredients and shake well.
In a large salad bowl, toss the spinach, blue cheese, blueberries and pecans.
Add dressing and toss gently.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Red Grapefruit, Avocado and Pomegranate Spinach Salad

name: Spinach & Bacon Salad
directions: Combine dressing ingredients in a small shaker& shake well.
Wash& dry spinach leaves and place in salad bowl.
Peel onion, cut in half, slice thinly, separate ring halves& add to salad bowl.
Add the rest of the ingredients to the bowl.
Pour dressing over all& toss.

similar.name: Spinach Salad With Hot Salami Cubes

name: Spinach and Cheese Pizza
directions: Combine the oil, spinach, 2/3 c.
Parmesan cheese, paarsley, garlic, basil, salt and the pepper and puree this combination in a food processor.
You will need one risen ball of dough from the two from the"Basic Pizza Dough Recipe".# 84144
Put this dough on a lightly floured board.
Pound flat.
Roll out to about 10-12" around.
Place on a lightly greased cookie sheet that has been sprinkled with a little white cornmeal.
The cornmeal gives the pizza a nice bottom.
Make sure you form a rim around the edge of the dough.
Bake in a 400* oven for 10-15 min.
or until it is lightly browned.
Repeat with the next dough ball for a second pizza or freeze dough for later use.
Spread each dough with equal amounts of the spinach mixture then add the red peppers and cheeses.
Bake at 400* for 10 min.
or until the chees melts.
NOTE: To make this easier you can use two 1-lb.
loaves of frozen bread dough, thawed.
It will save you on alot of time.

similar.name: Spinach Salad With Hot Salami Cubes

name: Spinach Salad Blues
directions: Combine the shallot, 1/2 pint of the blueberries, salt, sugar, vinegar and oil in a blender and blend well.
Trim the spinach and rinse well.
Pat the spinach dry.
Combine the spinach, remaining blueberries, blue cheese and pecans in a large salad bowl and toss to mix well.
Add the blueberry vinaigrette just before serving and toss until well coated.

name: Spinach and Pear Salad
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in a small bowl, stirring with a whisk.
Place the pear slices in a large bowl.
Spoon 1 tablespoon dressing over pears; toss to coat.
Add the remaining dressing, spinach, and onion; toss to coat.

name: Spinach, Mushroom and Red Onion Salad
directions: Combine orange juice, lemon juice and honey, in a medium bowl. Slowly whisk in olive oil until combine; season with tarragon, salt and pepper to taste.
Combine spinach, mushrooms, mandarin orange segments and onions in a large bowl. Toss salad with enough dressing to coat lightly. Garnishes with cranberries and pine nuts.

similar.name: Red Grapefruit, Avocado and Pomegranate Spinach Salad
Spinach and Citrus Salad With Berry Vinaigrette

name: Spinach Salad
directions: Dressing:  In a blender or food processor, mix the first 7 dressing ingredients.
Then marinate the purple onion sliced in rings for several hours in the dressing.
Salad:  Clean spinach and lettuce and break into pieces.
Mix with swiss cheese (sometimes I use colby-jack), cottage cheese, bacon and mushrooms.
Note:  Add dressing and bacon just before serving.
Dressing keeps fresh for 4 days.

name: Spinach & Roquefort Salad
directions: Make Vinaigrette. Combine vinegar, honey, salt, and pepper in a small bowl. Whisk in oil and water to emulsify. Stir in minced shallots.
Make Salad. Place sunflower seeds in medium skillet. Toast over medium heat 5-6 minutes or until browned and fragrant. Transfer to small bowl and let cool.
Thinly slice 1 large apple leaving peel on the apple for color.  Use one large tart apple or two small contrasting flavors of apple.
Just before serving, toss baby spinach, thinly sliced apple, crumbled roquefort, and cooled sunflower seeds with vinaigrette. Divide among salad plates and serve.

similar.name: Spinach, Mushroom and Red Onion Salad
Spinach Salad With Hot Salami Cubes
Spinach and Citrus Salad With Berry Vinaigrette
Red Grapefruit, Avocado and Pomegranate Spinach Salad

name: Spinach Salad With Hot Salami Cubes
directions: Heat 1 tbs oil in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add the salami and cook until sizzling and brown, about 2-3 minutes Remove from heat.
Remove salami from skillet with a slotted spoon and set aside.
Add the mustard, honey, vinegar, salt, pepper, and the remaining oil to the rendered fat in the pan, and whisk together to form the dressing.
Add the onion and salami and return to medium heat. Cook just until the onion wilts, about 1 minute
Pour the hot dressing over the greens and serve with the eggs (chopped if desired).

name: Apple Spinach Salad
directions: Combine onion spinach, and apple in a bowl; toss well.
Mix lime juice, orange juice, honey, and pepper in a small bowl until smooth.
Drizzle sauce over salad.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Spinach, Mushroom and Red Onion Salad
Red Grapefruit, Avocado and Pomegranate Spinach Salad

name: Red Pepper and Spinach Lasagna
directions: Preheat the oven to 350°F Place the peppers in a roasting tin and drizzle with the oil and balsamic vinegar. Roast for 20 minutes, add the garlic and roast for a further 10 minutes until the peppers are softened and charred.
Meanwhile, wilt the spinach in a large pan with a splash of water for 2 minutes only. Season well and set aside.

To make the sauce, heat the milk with the bay leaf to just below boiling point and simmer gently for 5 minutes. Melt the butter in a non-stick pan, add the flour and cook, stirring all the time, for 2 minutes. Gradually add the milk, whisking well, and bring to the boil until thickened. Stir in the mustard and half of the Parmesan.

To layer up the lasagna, spoon a third of the sauce into the base of an ovenproof dish. Scatter over half of the peppers, half of the spinach and half of the mozzarella. Top with a layer of lasagna. Repeat this process, finishing with the final third of the sauce. Scatter over the remaining Parmesan and bake for 25 to 30 minutes.

similar.name: Spinach Salad With Hot Salami Cubes

name: Red Grapefruit, Avocado and Pomegranate Spinach Salad
directions: Brush avocado slices with lime juice.
Arrange 1.5 cups spinach on each of 6 small plates; top each serving with avocado slices and grapefruit sections.
Combine sugar, vinegar, mustard, and salt in a small bowl; whisk until sugar dissolves.  Gradually add oil, stirring well with a whisk.  Stir in poppy seeds.
Drizzle 1.5 t dressing over each salad.
Sprinkle each with 1/2 t sunflower seeds and about 1 T pomegranate seeds.

similar.name: Spinach and Citrus Salad With Berry Vinaigrette
Spinach, Mushroom and Red Onion Salad

name: Spinach-Pear Salad
directions: Mix the first 10 ingredients together, preferably with a food processor or blender so that it mixes well.  Set the dressing aside.

Remove and discard the stems from the spinach leaves.  Wash spinach, and pat dry with paper towels.  Combine the spinach, pears, raisins, and pecans in a large bowl. Pour reserved dressing over salad, and toss gently.  Serve immediately.

similar.name: Spinach, Mushroom and Red Onion Salad

name: Spinach and Sausage Stuffed Peppers
directions: In a large skillet, over medium high heat, wilt the spinach for about one minute, then drain and press out all of the water; chop coarsely.
Wipe out the skillet.
In a large bowl, combine the bread, milk, egg, and cheese; knead to form a dough.
Mix in the pine nuts, onion, sausage, and spinach; lightly season with salt and pepper.
Pack the mixture into the peppers (you may want to moisten your hands to prevent the filling from sticking to them).
Heat the oil in the skillet, then add the peppers, filling side down; cook until well browned, about 4 minutes.
Turn the peppers over and cook until the skins are browned and blistered, another 4 minutes.
Add tomato sauce and the chicken broth, cover, and reduce heat to a simmer to cook through, about 5 or 6 minutes.
Serve the peppers with the sauce spooned on top.

similar.name: Spinach Salad With Hot Salami Cubes

name: Spinach and Citrus Salad With Berry Vinaigrette
directions: In a bowl (or small blender), mash the blackberries until no chunks remain.
Stir in the orange juice, vinegar and oil. Cover and refrigerate until serving.
In a salad serving bowl toss together the spinach, grapefruit segments, orange segments, onion and mushrooms.
Pour the dressing over top of the salad and toss well to combine.
Garnish with the chopped walnuts and serve immediately.

similar.name: Red Grapefruit, Avocado and Pomegranate Spinach Salad
Spinach, Mushroom and Red Onion Salad
